message:
test(conformance): real weighted bincount + minlength coverage

Wires bincount_with(weights, minlength) through the signal_differential
harness and adds three new NumPy-oracle fixtures that exercise paths the
original suite could not reach:

- bincount_weights_golden: same input as the previously-misnamed
  bincount_weighted_golden but with actual weight values, locking F64
  output dtype and weighted-sum semantics.
- bincount_minlength_pads_golden: minlength=5 on a 3-element input pads
  the output to length 5 with trailing zeros.
- bincount_weights_and_minlength_golden: both kwargs together, weighted
  sum collected in a bin with a gap, minlength exceeding max(x)+1.

The prior bincount_weighted_golden fixture was renamed to
bincount_with_gap_golden because it was never actually weighted — it
only exercised the zero-filled intermediate bin path for unweighted
counts.

The SignalDifferentialCase struct gains optional weights + minlength
fields (both default empty/0 via serde); the bincount handler now
forwards them to bincount_with.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
